description: NCBI IgBLAST service for BCR/TCR V(D)J recombination analysis. Identifies germline V/D/J genes, annotates CDR1-CDR3 and framework regions (FR1-FR4), detects somatic hypermutations, and outputs AIRR-standard format. Provides 2 tools: analyze_vdj_batch, extract_cdr3_from_airr.

Influenza BCR lineage analysis service integrating single-cell sequencing, experimental binding/neutralization data, and ML predictions. Supports UMAP metadata extraction, scBCR/bulk BCR integration, and comprehensive feature dataset generation. Provides 4 tools for data integration.

MetaBCR deep learning model for antibody-antigen binding affinity prediction. Supports flu, SARS, RSV, HIV antigens. Uses sequence-based neural networks to predict binding scores. Critical for antibody screening and therapeutic candidate prioritization.

Comprehensive single-cell B-cell analysis platform with 17 tools. Provides UMAP visualization, cell type distribution, marker gene expression, SHM analysis, pseudotime trajectory analysis, and differential gene expression. Integrates with MetaBCR for binding prediction visualization.

B cell repertoire analysis service with 14 tools. Includes trajectory analysis (Monocle3), clonal expansion, isotype switching, SHM rate calculation, repertoire diversity (Shannon/Simpson/Hill), germinal center dynamics, plasma cell prediction, and CytoTRACE differentiation analysis.

T cell analysis service with 6 tools. **KEY TOOL: integrate_tcr_data_complete** - Merges CSV prediction results (from NetTCR, IgBLAST) into RDS Seurat objects by barcode matching. Use this after NetTCR predictions to combine prediction scores with cell metadata. Also provides cell type visualization, trajectory analysis, TCR binding visualization, and clonotype expansion analysis.

Comprehensive immune system analysis service with 7 tools. Provides unified immune cell visualization, marker analysis, trajectory analysis, DEG analysis, CellChat cell-cell communication, cell isolation, and quick comprehensive analysis pipeline.

BCR data integration pipeline service. Integrates AIRR-format V(D)J analysis results with Seurat single-cell objects. Supports format conversion, UMAP embedding, clustering, cell type annotation, and metadata merging.

MixTCRpred analysis service with 4 figure-generating tools for TCR-peptide binding studies. Provides single-cell DEG analysis (run_figure2), antigen binding visualization (run_figure3), trajectory analysis (run_figure4), and isotype/SHM analysis (run_figure5) for publication-ready figures.

NetTCR-2.2 TCR-peptide binding prediction service with 6 tools. Uses 20-model TFLite ensemble (5-fold CV x 4 splits) for prediction. Supports 26 pre-trained peptide-specific models with percentile rank rescaling, plus pan-specific fallback for unseen peptides. Auto-detects input format (native 7-CDR: peptide/A1-A3/B1-B3, or legacy: CDR3a/CDR3b/peptide/TRA/TRB_v_gene). Tools: predict_tcr_binding_fast, predict_tcr_binding_ensemble, predict_tcr_binding_complete, validate_tcr_input, check_peptide_support, list_available_peptides. Reference: Montemurro et al., Nucleic Acids Research, 2024.

RiboNN mRNA translation efficiency prediction service with 2 tools. Supports TE prediction with automatic CDS stop codon fixing and result sorting. Trained on ribosome profiling data for human/mouse species.

GeMoRNA mRNA design service with 5 tools (published in Science 2025). Generates optimized CDS, 5'UTR, 3'UTR, and complete mRNA sequences. Uses Transformer architecture for AI-powered sequence design with enhanced translation efficiency and stability.

CodonTransformer codon optimization service with 2 tools. Deep learning model for species-specific codon usage optimization. Supports batch and single sequence optimization with multiple output formats.
RiNALMo RNA language model service with 1 tool for ribosome loading rate prediction. Pre-trained on millions of RNA sequences. Supports 5'UTR, mRNA, CDS, and 3'UTR sequence analysis.

SPIRED-Fitness protein fitness prediction service. Deep learning model predicting protein stability and functional fitness from sequence. Supports saturation mutagenesis analysis and mutant screening.

FoldX saturation mutation scanning service. Combines FoldX energy calculations with structure repair for stability prediction. Supports CIF/PDB input, automatic RepairPDB, and systematic saturation mutagenesis.
Multi-source data integration and filtering service. Merges results from FoldX and SPIRED-Fitness predictions. Applies customizable filtering criteria to prioritize optimal mutation candidates.
